nasb.text: For everyone who partakes only of milk is not accustomed to the word of righteousness, for he is an infant.

esv.text: for everyone who lives on milk is unskilled in the word of righteousness, since he is a child.

cnv.text: 凡是吃奶的，還是個嬰孩，對公義的道理沒有經歷；

ccb.text: 因为只能吃奶的人还是婴孩，不熟习仁义的道理。

csbs.text: 要知道，凡是吃奶的人，都对称义的道理不熟悉，因为他是个小孩子；
